languages.text: [протянуть приказ Ювенны] "Похоже, Изимонд прилагает немалые усилия ради титула?"

traits.locale_text: [протянуть приказ Ювенны] "Похоже, Изимонд прилагает немалые усилия ради титула?"

languages.text: [Hold out Juvenna's order] "It seems Isimond has gone to some lengths to earn himself a noble title."
languages.original_text: [протянуть приказ Ювенны] "Похоже, Изимонд прилагает немалые усилия ради титула?"

languages.text: [Juvennas Befehl zeigen] "Isimond scheint große Anstrengungen unternommen zu haben, um sich einen Adelstitel zu sichern."
languages.original_text: [Hold out Juvenna's order] "It seems Isimond has gone to some lengths to earn himself a noble title."

traits.locale_text: [Juvennas Befehl zeigen] "Isimond scheint große Anstrengungen unternommen zu haben, um sich einen Adelstitel zu sichern."

languages.text: 【出示尤文娜的任命文书】“看来伊西蒙德为了给自己挣个贵族头衔，还真是费了不少功夫。”
languages.original_text: [Hold out Juvenna's order] "It seems Isimond has gone to some lengths to earn himself a noble title."

traits.locale_text: 【出示尤文娜的任命文书】“看来伊西蒙德为了给自己挣个贵族头衔，还真是费了不少功夫。”

languages.text: [Lui remettre le décret de Juvenna] « Isimond semble s'être donné du mal pour obtenir un titre de noblesse. »
languages.original_text: [Hold out Juvenna's order] "It seems Isimond has gone to some lengths to earn himself a noble title."

traits.locale_text: [Lui remettre le décret de Juvenna] « Isimond semble s'être donné du mal pour obtenir un titre de noblesse. »

languages.text: [Mostrar la orden de Juvenna] «Parece que Isimond ha hecho méritos para ganarse un título nobiliario».
languages.original_text: [Hold out Juvenna's order] "It seems Isimond has gone to some lengths to earn himself a noble title."

traits.locale_text: [Mostrar la orden de Juvenna] «Parece que Isimond ha hecho méritos para ganarse un título nobiliario».

languages.text: [Juvenna'nın emrini uzat] "Görünüşe göre İsimond, kendine soylu bir ünvan kazanmak için biraz uğraşmış."
languages.original_text: [Hold out Juvenna's order] "It seems Isimond has gone to some lengths to earn himself a noble title."

traits.locale_text: [Juvenna'nın emrini uzat] "Görünüşe göre İsimond, kendine soylu bir ünvan kazanmak için biraz uğraşmış."

languages.text: ジュベナが注文したものを差し出す。「イシモンドは爵位を得るために、かなり努力したようですね。」
